fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Supplied by
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source of the supply that fills the demand you track from, such as, a production order line.

fields.name: Demanded by
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source of the demand that the supply is tracked from.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the tracked items are expected to enter the inventory.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item that has been tracked in this entry.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity, in the base unit of measure, of the item that has been tracked in this entry.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: For Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document that the item is tracked for.
The available types are the following:

Sales


Requisition Line


Purchase


Item Ledger Entry


Prod. Order Line


Prod. Order Component


Planning Line


Planning Component


Transfer


Service Order

fields.name: For Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the subtype of the document that the items have been tracked for.
When the order tracking is created for a production order line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Document Type field on that line.

fields.name: For ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the document or journal that the items have been tracked for.
When the items are tracked for a production order line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Document No. field on the production order line. When the items are reserved for a requisition line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Template Name field in the Requisition Line table.

fields.name: For Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal batch name when the items in this order tracking entry are tracked for a requisition line.

fields.name: For Prod. Order Line
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the production order line that the order tracking is used for.
When the tracking is for a production order line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Line No. field on the production order line.

fields.name: For Ref. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reference number of the line that the items are tracked for.
When the items are tracked for either a sales, purchase, or requisition line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Line No. field on the table you are tracking from.
When the items are tracked for an item ledger entry, the program copies the contents of this field from the Entry No. field on the table you are tracking from.

fields.name: From Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of document that the items have been tracked from.
The available types are the following:

Sales


Requisition Line


Purchase


Item Ledger Entry


Prod. Order Line


Prod. Order Component


Planning Line


Planning Component


Transfer


Service Order

fields.name: From Subtype
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the subtype of the document that the items have been tracked from.
When the items are tracked from a purchase or sales line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Document Type field on that line.

fields.name: From ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ID of the document or journal that the items have been tracked from.
When the items are tracked from a sales or purchase line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Document No. field on that line.
When the items are tracked from a requisition line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Template Name field on that line.

fields.name: From Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal batch name when the items in this entry are tracked from a requisition line.

fields.name: From Prod. Order Line
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the production order line that the items are tracked from.
When the tracking is from a production order line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Line No. field on the production order line.

fields.name: From Ref. No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the reference number of the line that the items are tracked from.
When the items are tracked from either a sales, purchase, or requisition line, the program copies the contents of this field from the Line No. field on that line.
When the items are tracked from an item ledger entry, the program copies the contents of this field from the Entry No. field.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the line that the items are tracked from.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date of the line that the items are tracked from.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the line that the items are tracked from.

fields.name: Warning
fields.tooltip: Specifies there is a date conflict in the order tracking entries for this line.
